55057.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
55057.description: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

55058.title: CNN Town Hall
55058.description: President Joe Biden participates in a town hall in Cincinnati, Ohio. Anchor Don Lemon moderates the live event focusing on a wide range of issues facing the nation ranging from Covid-19 to the economy.

55059.title: Anderson Cooper 360
55059.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

55060.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
55060.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes that use stale bread as the key ingredient.

55061.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
55061.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

55062.title: World Sport
55062.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

55063.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
55063.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world, followed by the latest sporting news.

55065.title: World Sport
55065.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

55066.title: CNN Newsroom with Kim Brunhuber
55066.description: Live from Atlanta, Rosemary Church brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

55067.title: CNN Newsroom with Isa Soares
55067.description: Daily headlines and breaking stories live from CNN headquarters in Atlanta. The rotating cast of anchors and contributors include Carol Costello, Kyra Phillips, Suzanne Malveaux, Brooke Baldwin, Don Lemon, Randi Kaye and Fredricka Whitfield.

55068.title: Early Start
55068.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

55069.title: New Day
55069.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

55070.title: World Sport
55070.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

55071.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
55071.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

55072.title: Connect the World
55072.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

55073.title: World Sport
55073.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

55074.title: Connect the World
55074.description: Taking the viewers on a journey across the continents.

55075.title: One World with Zain Asher
55075.description: Offering a fresh and inclusive take on the top stories from Africa, Europe and beyond, giving every continent an equal voice.

55076.title: Inside Africa
55076.description: From superbikes to racecars, some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels provide an inside look at what life is like on, and off, the track.

55077.title: Amanpour
55077.description: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

55078.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
55078.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

55079.title: Quest Means Business
55079.description: Richard Quest presides over a cast of experts and correspondents to deliver unrivaled facts, figures and analysis from the business world, a nightly wealth check.

55080.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
55080.description: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.

55081.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
55081.description: Wolf Blitzer is in the command center for breaking news, politics and extraordinary reports from around the world.
